visitday: Number of days since baseline scan
MAQ: How many times did you formal meditation practice over the past week? ____ times
MAQ_1: What was the average duration of each meditation session? ____ minutes (please give estimate, not range)
MAQ_3:
Please tick the appropriate box (Never - Always) to indicate how much of each of the following were true for you over the past week.

 
When meditating, how much of the time: - was your attention focused on what you intended to focus on (body, breath, sounds etc.)?
MAQ_4:
Please tick the appropriate box (Never - Always) to indicate how much of each of the following were true for you over the past week.

 
When meditating, how much of the time: - were you noticing when you were getting distracted?
MAQ_5:
Please tick the appropriate box (Never - Always) to indicate how much of each of the following were true for you over the past week.

 
When meditating, how much of the time: - were you practicing an accepting attitude toward what you were experiencing?
MAQ_6:
Please tick the appropriate box (Never - Always) to indicate how much of each of the following were true for you over the past week.

 
When meditating, how much of the time: - were you practicing being gentle and compassionate toward yourself?
MAQ_7:
Questions 7 to 12 ask about your informal practice (being mindful in everyday life, outside of meditation sessions).
Again, please tick the box to indicate how much of each of the following were true for you over the past week.

 

In your daily life, how much of the time were you practicing: - paying attention to everyday activities (e.g. eating, walking, chores, communicating etc.)?
